  "findings": [
    "Grounding electrode conductor clamp is not listed for direct burial or concrete encasement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the non-compliant clamp with a clamp listed for direct burial (typically marked with 'DB') before backfilling."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.70 requires that grounding clamps used on buried electrodes or in concrete be listed for direct burial. Using a standard clamp in an underground application leads to corrosion and eventual failure of the grounding electrode system connection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.70",
    "NEC 250.68"
  ]
}
